content: The Canada Greener Homes Grant provides up to $5,000 in non-repayable contributions for commercial property energy efficiency improvements. Eligible upgrades include HVAC system replacements, building insulation, window and door upgrades, and heat pump installations. Administered by Natural Resources Canada (NRCan). Applications are open year-round on a first-come, first-served basis. Applicants must obtain an EnerGuide evaluation before and after the upgrade. The grant covers up to 50% of eligible retrofit costs. Eligible businesses include Canadian-incorporated SMBs in any province with commercial property.
